title: Add kataforge check validator
goal: Add a local `kataforge check` content validator that validates configured ProblemPack content and fails fast with actionable file-path errors before users run the app.
acceptance: The package exposes a local CLI command runnable as `pnpm exec kataforge check` from the repository root.
`kataforge check` validates the merged KataForge config, problem files, assessments, cursus files, lessons, and checkpoints from configured directories.
The validator reports concise counts on success and exits with code 0 for the current repository content.
Invalid content exits nonzero and prints actionable errors including the affected file path and reason, covering at least duplicate kata ids and references to missing kata/lesson/checkpoint ids.
The implementation reuses or shares existing schema/loading logic where practical instead of duplicating incompatible validation rules.
README or docs mention the validator in the Scripts/ProblemPack workflow, and automated tests cover success and failure fixtures.
must_ask_if: Supporting the command requires changing the public problem/cursus/checkpoint formats incompatibly.
The validator cannot run locally without network access or external services.
